programme.title: Point Break, (1991, Action)
programme.desc: An F.B.I. Agent goes undercover to catch a gang of surfers who may be bank robbers.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction, (1994, Thriller)
programme.desc: Writer-director Quentin Tarantino delivers an iconic cast of characters in PULP FICTION, a wildly entertaining tale of violence and redemption. John Travolta, Samuel L. Jackson, Uma Thurman, and Bruce Willis star in this pop culture phenomenon.

programme.title: Lucky Number Slevin, (2006, Thriller)
programme.desc: A case of mistaken identity lands Slevin into the middle of a war being plotted by two of the city's most rival crime bosses: The Rabbi and The Boss.

programme.title: A Simple Plan, (1998, Crime)
programme.desc: In a gym bag. That's how three men size up what they've found in the snowy Minnesota woods. They've come across a downed plane with a rotting corpse inside...and over $4 million stuffed inside a duffel bag. Finders, keepers? Maybe.

programme.title: Mulholland Falls, (1996, Thriller)
programme.desc: Four tough, no-nonsense and very crooked cops investigate the murder of a young woman, When they discover she was romantically linked to their boss and a prominent U.S. Army General, they try to cover up the murder.

programme.title: 8 Heads in a Duffel Bag, (1997, Thriller)
programme.desc: All gangster Tommy Spinelli wants to do is deliver his carry-on duffel bag to his boss. Unfortunately, the bag is switched with a Mexican-bound medical student...who has no idea that the bag contains the severed heads of eight Los Angeles gangsters!

programme.title: Original Gangstas, (1996, Action)
programme.desc: A fast-paced Action-Thriller about adults living in a crime-ridden area. They are tired of being bullied, and take matters into their own hands to rid the town of the criminals.

programme.title: Stand Up Guys, (2013, Action)
programme.desc: Oscar winners Al Pacino, Christopher Walken, and Alan Arkin star in this action-comedy about retired gangsters who reunite for one last epic night.

programme.title: The Big Short, (2015, Political Comedies)
programme.desc: Based on the true story of four outsiders who saw what the big banks, media, and government refused to: the global collapse of the economy. A bold investment leads them into the dark underbelly of banking, where everyone and everything is in question.

programme.title: The Sterile Cuckoo, (1969, Drama)
programme.desc: In this romantic comedy, an eccentric girl forces a college love affair with a reluctant student. Nominated for 2 Academy Awards including Best Song "Come Saturday Morning."

programme.title: Tell Me That You Love Me, Junie Moon, (1970, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: The story of three wildly neurotic characters: A facially disfigured girl, a homosexual paraplegic and an introvert epileptic who, after leaving the hospital, set up housekeeping together in a cottage where they support each other.

programme.title: Stepping Out, (1991, Comedy)
programme.desc: An uplifting comedy about an unlikely group of people who find friendship and hope when they step out to participate in a weekly dance class run by a former Broadway dancer/singer.

programme.title: Liza With A "Z", (1972, Musical)
programme.desc: Liza Minnelli stars in a television concert directed and choreographed by Bob Fosse. She performs such songs as the title number, Liza with a Z and Son of a Preacher Man

programme.title: Flower Drum Song, (1961, Dark Humor & Black Comedies)
programme.desc: A young woman arrives in San Francisco's Chinatown from Hong Kong with the intention of marrying a rakish nightclub owner, unaware he is involved with one of his singers.

programme.title: 12 Angry Men, (1957, Courtroom Drama)
programme.desc: Eleven jurors are convinced that the defendant is guilty of murder. The twelfth has no doubt of his innocence. How can this one man steer the others toward the same conclusion? Henry Fonda and Lee J. Cobb lead the all-star cast in this classic!

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven, (1960, Western)
programme.desc: Yul Brynner stars as one of seven gunslingers pitted against an army of marauding bandits in this rousing classic that made stars of Steve McQueen, Charles Bronson, and James Coburn. Eli Wallach also stars in this timeless tale of good versus evil.

programme.title: The Great Escape, (1963, War)
programme.desc: Steve McQueen, James Garner, and Richard Attenborough headline a stellar cast in one of the most ingenious and suspenseful adventure films of all time as a team of Allied soldiers mount a daring escape from an inescapable Nazi POW camp.

programme.title: Rudy, (1993, Inspirational Drama)
programme.desc: All Rudy Ruettiger wants in life is to play football for his beloved Notre Dame. Unfortunately, Rudy is no athlete, his academic record is spotty, and his family can't afford to send him to college.

programme.title: Harriet the Spy, (1996, Comedy)
programme.desc: Harriet M. Welsch is probably the world’s most accomplished 11-year-old spy. Harriet dreams of being a writer, and her nanny and best friend Golly told her to start by writing down everything she sees.

programme.title: Clueless, (1995, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: A US West Coast teen lifestyle parody centered around Cher, a popular high school girl who spends her days playing match-maker, helping her friends with fashion choices, and looking for a boyfriend.

programme.title: Varsity Blues, (1999, Inspirational Drama)
programme.desc: At first, backup quarterback Jonathan is no football star. But when the starting quarterback is injured, he is thrown into the game but also in direct conflict with his coach and girlfriend.

programme.title: The Cutting Edge, (1992, Romance)
programme.desc: Action and romance take to the screen when a self-centered ex-hockey star (D.B. Sweeney) and a prima donna champion figure skater (Moira Kelly) become unlikely partners in pursuit of Olympic gold.

programme.title: School Ties, (1992, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: After receiving a scholarship to an exclusive prep school, working-class teen David Greene becomes a star athlete and wins the attention of a beautiful debutante.

programme.title: Dick, (1999, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: The year is 1972 and Betsy Jobs and Arlene Lorenzo just want to have a good time. But during a class field trip to the White House, they cluelessly wander into a behind-closed-doors, top-secret shredding session. Rating: PG-13

programme.title: Clueless, (1995, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: A US West Coast teen lifestyle parody centered around Cher, a popular high school girl who spends her days playing match-maker, helping her friends with fashion choices, and looking for a boyfriend.

programme.title: Varsity Blues, (1999, Inspirational Drama)
programme.desc: At first, backup quarterback Jonathan is no football star. But when the starting quarterback is injured, he is thrown into the game but also in direct conflict with his coach and girlfriend.

programme.title: Convoy, (1978, Thriller)
programme.desc: Feuding with Sheriff Lyle Wallace (Ernest Borgnine), Martin Penwald (Kris Kristofferson) unites scores of his fellow-drivers via Citizen Band radio into a mile-long convoy which, powered by pent-up resentments, rolls along the Arizona highways.

programme.title: Le Mans, (1971, Inspirational Drama)
programme.desc: Steve McQueen is an American endurance driver racing the 24 HOURS OF LE MANS in this fast and furious original movie. Filmed on location throughout the Le Mans circuit, with jaw dropping car crash stunts and heart-pounding action.

programme.title: Escape From Alcatraz, (1979, Action)
programme.desc: Superstar Clint Eastwood and director Don Siegel re-team for their fifth film in this fascinating account of the only three men ever to escape from the infamous maximum security prison at Alcatraz.

programme.title: Foxy Brown, (1974, Action)
programme.desc: A blaxploitation film about a woman whose drug-dealing brother ratted on her undercover narcotics-agent boyfriend to the mob and she, in turn, poses as a call girl to infiltrate the mobsters who butchered him.

programme.title: The Gambler, (1974, Thriller)
programme.desc: James Caan portrays a compulsive gambler who can't quit or win. He falls into debt to the mob for $40,000 but seems to relish the thrill of gambling against the long shot.

programme.title: White Lightning, (1973, Action)
programme.desc: In one of his most memorable roles, Burt Reynolds portrays a moonshine whiskey runner who turns state's witness to avenge the murder of a boy no one understood.

programme.title: Gator, (1976, Action)
programme.desc: The Feds want Gator McKlusky (Burt Reynolds) to go undercover to expose a local crime boss and former boyhood pal, Bama McCall. When Gator discovers Bama is involved in extortion, prostitution, and murder, the suspense builds to an explosive climax!

programme.title: The Bank Shot, (1974, Screwball)
programme.desc: Fresh from his recent jailbreak, criminal mastermind George C. Scott is already plotting his next bank heist. This time he's thinking big...he's not just taking the loot, he's stealing the whole bank in a film brimming with imaginative silliness.

programme.title: Go Tell the Spartans, (1978, Military & War Action)
programme.desc: A savvy U.S. major (Burt Lancaster) reluctantly obeys an ill-advised order to send out a unit of South Vietnamese troops and American advisors to a peaceful, former French outpost. He fears it will draw the Viet Cong into the area – and he’s right!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Fusion Foes
programme.desc: Zuzu takes center stage in an epic rematch against Leo Institute’s dueling diamond, Julia Krystal! Will Zuzu avenge her earlier loss and walk away a winner, or will history repeat itself and leave Zuzu singing the blues?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Gong the Strong
programme.desc: When Gong’s old sparring partner sets a trap for Yuya, the only way Gong can save his friend is to forfeit his duel and get tossed from the tourney!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: The Pendulum Swings Both Ways: Part 1
programme.desc: Sylvio finally has just the thing to take Yuya down – a deck full of Pendulum Cards! Could Yuya's days in the spotlight be done for?
programme.sub-title: The Pendulum Swings Both Ways: Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: The Pendulum Swings Both Ways: Part 2
programme.desc: Yuya is off his game and on the run as Sylvio zeroes in on zeroing out his life points! If Yuya can’t get into the swing of things, this could be his final performance!
programme.sub-title: The Pendulum Swings Both Ways: Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Making the Cut: Part 1
programme.desc: Sora is psyched to put on a showstopping duel for the fans, but his opponent Shay is set to turn Sora’s one man show into a no man show!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Making the Cut: Part 2
programme.desc: Sora and Shay's heated duel hits its boiling point when dark secrets about their hidden history come to light! Could there be something sinister behind Sora’s sweet-toothed smile?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Sora’s Secrets: Part 1
programme.desc: While Yuto is looking for answers, Sora is looking to get some revenge! But when these two tangle, Yuya finds out more than he ever expected!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Sora’s Secrets: Part 2
programme.desc: Surprises are in the cards as the battle between Sora and Yuto comes to an unexpected conclusion! But just when Yuya thinks he’s seen everything, a new face shows up on the scene that makes Yuya do a triple take!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: A Dark Reflection
programme.desc: Yuya can’t believe his eyes when he finds himself standing face-to-face-to-face with two lookalikes who are out to destroy each other… and everything in sight!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Warped Dimensions
programme.desc: Yuya is in a coma, and nothing has been able to stir him from his terrifying state! Is Yuya down for the count, or will his duelmate’s ESP and TLC make him A-OK?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: A Duel Personality
programme.desc: It’s time for the second round of the Arc League Championship! Yuya is pitted against his polar opposite – a duelist who doesn't duel to entertain, but rather put his foes into pain!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Stealth Warriors
programme.desc: When a mysterious visitor threatens to throw the Championship into chaos, Declan moves in to uncover who they are and soon finds himself facing off against a merciless mercenary!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Bracing for Battle
programme.desc: Declan confronts Celina and shares a story from their past that reveals a frightening future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Battle Fields
programme.desc: It’s time for a nail biting battle royal in the ARC League Championship! With four battle zones to choose from, the action has never been more mesmerizing or the duels more dangerous!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: While Yuya is looking to knock the competition out cold in the Volcano Zone, the Iceberg Zone is heating up as Zuzu and Gong team up to defrost their foes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Danger Zones
programme.desc: As the battle royal rumbles on, Yuya finds himself caught in the crossfire when he stumbles across a battle between not-so-noble Knights!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Obelisk Assault
programme.desc: Yuya takes on a terrifying trio from Fusion Dimension who turn their victims into cards!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Dragon's Vengeance
programme.desc: Outnumbered, outmatched, and out of options, will Yuya tap into a deep-seeded darkness to overcome defeat?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Identity Crisis
programme.desc: Zuzu races to stay one step ahead of a cold-blooded hunter who's hot on her heels! Can Zuzu ditch this danger, or will he prove too cunning for her to escape?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Battlefronts
programme.desc: Sparks fly in the Volcano Zone when all our heroes face off against the full fury of Fusion Dimension’s elite Obelisk Force! With more than life points on the line, the action has never been hotter!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Fighting for Fun
programme.desc: Are friends now foes as Yuya and Sora go deck to deck in a fiery face-off?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Dueling Declan
programme.desc: When Yuya discovers Declan's web of lies put his friends in danger, he challenges Declan to a battle as payback!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Kings vs. Dragons
programme.desc: Yuya’s battle with Declan takes a turn for the worse when Declan’s majestic monsters give Yuya the royal treatment!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Parental Guidance: Part 1
programme.desc: "It’s a family feud when Yuya takes on his mom in a duel where there’s more to lose than just his allowance! Can Yuya avoid being run down by Paradise City’s most feared motorcycle momma?"

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Parental Guidance: Part 2
programme.desc: The battle between Yuya and his mom kicks into high gear! Can Yuya avoid being grounded, or will Loco Yoko put the pedal to the metal and throttle her way to victory?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: City 'Scape
programme.desc: As Zuzu and Yugo try to unravel the riddle of Yuya's dimensional doubles, their sleuthing is cut short by Sector Security!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Tops Speed
programme.desc: Zuzu and Yugo redline their Duel Runner in a high-stakes Turbo Duel with Sector Security! Can they outrun the long arm of the law, or will Security put the brakes on their escape?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Synchro Sector
programme.desc: When Yuya and his pals arrive in the Synchro Dimension, Sector Security is waiting for them with open arms… and cuffs! Can Yuya smooth things out before Sylvio and Celina put a wrinkle in his plan?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Super Duelists
programme.desc: It’s a superheroic showdown in the Synchro Dimension pitting Super Gong against his arch-nemesis, Dennis the Destroyer!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Scream for the Green
programme.desc: Dennis and Gong are in for the ride of their lives when they’re introduced to the turbo-charged world of underground motorcycle dueling!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Dueling’s Most Wanted
programme.desc: The battle between Dashin’ Dennis and Sweet Baby Shay hits a speedbump when Sector Security pulls the plug on their Turbo Duel!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Showdown in the Slammer
programme.desc: Yuya learns the ins and outs of The Facility the hard way by coming face-to-face with the toughest and most dangerous duelist in the cell block: the Kingpin!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Hero’s Fall
programme.desc: With his deck on the line, Yuya looks to rock the cell block and KO the Kingpin!

programme.title: The Tontatta Kingdom gears up for its all-out assault on the Doflamingo Family, as Usopp and Robin are caught up in the war effort! Meanwhile, Franky arrives the headquarters of the toy movement where he finds Zoro, Nami & the others are cornered by Jora.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Making a Sortie! The Legendary Hero Usoland!

programme.title: Don Chin Jao's hatred of Garp and Luffy is finally explained, while his battle against Luffy comes to an end. With tremendous power, one of them is squarely eliminated! But is that really the end of the Colosseum battle?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Fierce Battle Coming to the End! Lucy vs. Chin Jao!

programme.title: With the battle with Don Chinjao long behind him, Luffy advances to the final round! Block-D contender Cavendish, however, takes the chance and pounces on Luffy, who is defended by an unlikely ally! The agenda of Colosseum gladiator Rebecca is exposed.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy and the Gladiator of Fate - Rebecca!

programme.title: Rebecca's deep bonds with the one-legged toy soldier are revealed! Her lineage can be traced to the previous ruler of Dressrosa - and her eternal bond with the damaged toy is linked to the violent overthrow of that regime by none other than Doflamingo!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Protect You to the End! Rebecca and the Toy Soldier!

programme.title: As Rebecca enters the ring for the battle for Block D, the crowd shows its contempt for her heritage - only to be scolded by an unlikely supporter. Meanwhile, the other Straw Hats start to reassemble to deal with the attack on the Sunny.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Last - and Bloodiest - Block! Block D Battle Begins!

programme.title: Doflamingo recounts for Law the surprising history of the Don Quixote Family, while Nami and the others battle the insane and powerful artist, Giolla! Her ultimate attack renders them incapacitated, and prompts the betrayal of one of their closest allies!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Decisive Battle! Giolla vs. the Straw Hats!

programme.title: Law is pinned by Fujitora, and Doflamingo has the upper hand! Only the most cunning of tricks could save Law's plan to hand Caesar over to Nami & the others! Meanwhile, the Sunny falls into danger again, & the battle for Block D heats up in the Colosseum.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Beautiful Sword! Cavendish of the White Horse!

programme.title: Law must put himself in harm's way to defend the Sunny and the Straw Hats from Doflamingo's all-out assault! With barely enough time to save the crew, plans change and send the Sunny on a new mission -- but will it be able to get underway?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Big Clash! Sanji vs. Doflamingo!

programme.title: Law & Doflamingo are embroiled in a heated showdown which triggers Momonosuke's memories of Doflamingo's cruelty from the first time they met; meanwhile, after a tearful fanboy conversation Zoro finally gets to see Luffy but all eyes are fixed on Rebecca.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Rebecca's Special Attack! Last-Ditch Sword Dance!

programme.title: Bartolomeo searches the Colosseum for Luffy but stumbles upon the medical center for the losers of the battles in the ring, but is everything at this center as it seems? Meanwhile, Rebecca has to fend off Rolling Logan's vicious bone-crushing grip attack.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Most Violent Fighter! Logan vs. Rebecca!

programme.title: The losers of the Colosseum battle who are being held below the infirmary have a surprising person in their midst! But do they have a clue as to their terrifying fate? Meanwhile, the Tontatta Kingdom's history is made clear.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Big Surprise! The True Identity of the Toy Soldier!

programme.title: Bartolomeo finally finds Luffy and starts to lead him to Zoro, while the toy soldier begins to tell the heart-breaking story of how Doflamingo cheated the Riku dynasty out of their control of Dressrosa!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Horrible Past! The Secret of Dressrosa!

programme.title: As the toy soldier's story continues, the sad fate of King Riku and his army, and his daughter Princess Viola, is revealed as well as how the people of Dressrosa fell into the hands of Doflamingo. And all the toys in the country share a mysterious secret.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Nightmare! The Tragic Night of Dressrosa!

programme.title: Zoro, Kin'emon, and Luffy are reunited again, but little do they know that their reunion is being monitored by a potential threat! Meanwhile, the battle rages on between Doflamingo and Law as these two powerhouses clash.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Showdown Between the Warlords! Law vs. Doflamingo!

programme.title: Zoro and Kin'emon make a mad dash to save Law but Navy Admiral Fujitora stands in their way, bringing his full power against them. The Navy is in hot pursuit as a ship approaches with unexpected visitors from the past.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Two Great Rivals Meet Each Other! Straw Hat and Heavenly Demon!

programme.title: After revealing the horrible history of Dressrosa, Toy Soldier now shares their plan to liberate the Tontatta Kingdom and bring down the Doflamingo Family, Operation SOP. Luffy bumps into a heavily-wounded Bellamy and Bartolomeo
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy Astonished! The Man Who Inherits Ace's Will!

programme.title: Usopp and Robin make their way via an underground tunnel dug by the tiny people of the Tontatta Tribe - a tunnel so small in fact, that Franky couldn't fit! Instead, Franky makes his way to the Toy House.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Operation SOP Starts! Usoland Charges Forth!

programme.title: As the contenders for the battle of Block D dwindle to only thirty, Rebecca has her hands full with the menacing Suleiman the Beheader! All hope seems lost that she can take him down and move on to the finals!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Burning Passion! Rebecca vs. Suleiman!

programme.title: The battle for Block D comes to a shocking end and the winner that emerges from the cloud of dust stuns the audience even more! Meanwhile, Luffy, Zoro, Kin'emon, and Wicka of the Tontatta Tribe are about to reach the lift to the palace.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The End of the Match?! A Surprising Result of Block D!

programme.title: Viola, aka Violet, once a great princess of the Dressrosa family, shows Luffy & the others a secret entrance into the palace which avoids the use of the heavily-guarded lift. In the palace's Suit Chamber, Navy Admiral Fujitora reveals his plans.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Admiral's Decision! Fujitora vs. Doflamingo!

programme.title: The final round at the Corrida Colosseum finally begins, as Diamante joins the combatants in an all-out struggle to win the Flare-Flare Fruit! As the stakes escalate, can one champion beat the others & snatch the fruit from the Colosseum's newest hazard?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Final Round Starts! Diamante the Hero Shows Up!

programme.title: Luffy and his group continue their ascent towards Doflamingo's inner sanctum, but standing in their way is an executive of the family whose power is so strong moving past him seems impossible! Meanwhile, Cavendish learns the dark secrets of Dressrosa.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Moving Castle! The Top Executive Pica Rises Up!

programme.title: As Operation SOP finally gets underway but as Leo makes the dash to hide the Tatabasco grape in Sugar's fruit basket, Robin calls for an emergency stop to the plan! Meanwhile, Luffy, Violet, and Zoro are stalled by Pica whose sheer size overwhelms them.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Dragon Claw Strikes! Lucy's Intimidating Attack!

programme.title: Operation SOP is underway and nearing its final stage! But Trebol proves a far stronger guard for Sugar than was expected, so Robin hatches a plan to lure him away. But is there enough time to execute the plan before the ruse is discovered?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Defeat Sugar! The Army of the Little People Charges!

programme.title: The Tontattas are devastated by Trebol's furious attack, but as Usopp tries to convince Leo to abort the operation, Leo tells him about their commander Toy Soldier's stunning true identity! The Toy Soldier finally shakes off Lao G and gets moving again!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Last Light of Hope! The Secret of Our Commander!

programme.title: Zoro continues his deadly duel with the nearly indestructible Pica! While the Toy Soldier narrowly escapes Lao G only to come face to face with Gladius! Luffy continues his mad dash to the top of the palace to face Doflamingo!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Rupture Human! Gladius Blows Up Big Time!

programme.title: With the Tontattas beaten, Robin turned into a toy, and Luffy, Franky, and the others busy elsewhere, Usopp is the last hope for Operation SOP! But will he be able to muster the confidence and courage to face the terrible Trebol?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Liar! Usoland on the Run!

programme.title: Usopp runs into trouble in his battle with Treebol, and flashback sheds light on how a young Kyros made the shocking transition from murderer to one of King Riku's most trusted men.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Fateful Encounter! Kyros and King Riku!

programme.title: In the Royal Palace, Viola, Luffy, and the Toy Soldier have hidden themselves outside Doflamingo's chamber, only to have more enemies approach from behind, leaving them surrounded! Meanwhile, Franky is knocked out cold by the Navy.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Operation Failed! Usoland the Hero Dies?!

programme.title: Toys all across Dressrosa regain their human form, a flood of forgotten memories return, and Kyros launches a long overdue attack on the villainous tyrant Doflamingo!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Legend is Back! Kyros' All-out Blow!

programme.title: Kyros finally taking down Doflamingo leaves Doflamingo's clan shocked! Meanwhile at the Colosseum, Rebecca gets her memories of her loving father Kyros back, and Sabo makes a move to end the championship battle by blowing up the whole ring!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Fire Fist Strikes! The Flare-Flare Fruit Power Returns!

programme.title: Luffy hurries to free Law, but with their pirate alliance dissolved, will Law still see Luffy as an ally? Meanwhile, Usopp has convinced his newfound followers to destroy the factory! Doflamingo's defeat has thrown Dressrosa into chaos.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Dashing onto the Scene! The Chief of Staff of the Revolutionary Army - Sabo!

programme.title: The mystery of Doflamingo's return from the dead is revealed! But there isn't much time to ponder how it happened, as his plan to silence the country of Dressrosa unfolds, spelling doom for the Straw Hats!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Devil's Trap! A Dressrosa Extermination Plan!

programme.title: Ex Machina, (2015, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A young programmer (Domhnall Gleeson) at an internet company is chosen by a reclusive CEO (Oscar Isaac) to evaluate the capabilities and consciousness of a beautiful and sophisticated robot (Alicia Vikander).

programme.title: The Mortal Instruments, (2013, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Clary's life is turned upside down when her mother is kidnapped and it's revealed that they are shadowhunters who are tasked with protecting the world from vampires, werewolves and demons. Clary must discover her talents and save her mother.

programme.title: The Host, (2013, Science fiction)
programme.desc: When an unseen enemy threatens mankind by taking over humans' bodies and erasing their minds, Melanie Stryder risks everything to protect the people she cares about most, proving that love can conquer all in a dangerous new world.

programme.title: Minority Report, (2002, Science fiction)
programme.desc: In the future, a division of the police department has the technology to arrest killers before they commit crimes; however, the tables turn on one of the cops working within the division.

programme.title: Mad Max, (1980, Action)
programme.desc: Max and the gang's worlds converge when the gang wants Max as badly as he wants them, especially after they target him for the death of their former leader.

programme.title: Snowpiercer, (2014, Science fiction)
programme.desc: After a failed global-warming experiment, a post-apocalyptic Ice Age has killed off nearly all life on the planet.

programme.title: Minority Report, (2002, Science fiction)
programme.desc: In the future, a division of the police department has the technology to arrest killers before they commit crimes; however, the tables turn on one of the cops working within the division.

programme.title: Ex Machina, (2015, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A young programmer (Domhnall Gleeson) at an internet company is chosen by a reclusive CEO (Oscar Isaac) to evaluate the capabilities and consciousness of a beautiful and sophisticated robot (Alicia Vikander).

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven Ride!, (1972, Western)
programme.desc: When his wife is killed, Marshal Chris Adams (Lee Van Cleef) discovers that a ruthless horde of marauders have killed all the men -- and will come back for the women -- in a nearby border town...unless The Magnificent Seven can stop them!

programme.title: The Lonely Man, (1957, Western)
programme.desc: Jack Palance stars as Jacob Wade, a notorious outlaw trying to ride the trail of respectability. But where Wade goes, his reputation follows. And so does trouble.

programme.title: Shane, (1953, Western)
programme.desc: A retired gunfighter, now a drifter determined to establish a peaceful life, comes to the aid of a homestead family threatened by a land barron and his hired gun.

programme.title: Gunfight At The O.K. Corral, (1957, Western)
programme.desc: Frontier lawman Wyatt Earp joins his three brothers in their feud against the villainous Clanton gang, a local clan of cattle thieves in Tombstone, Arizona.

programme.title: Wagon Team, (1952, Western)
programme.desc: Gene Autry jails himself to work on the suspected thief of an Army payroll, who escapes, but Gene catches up with him at the medicine show. It's a showdown when Gene goes after the missing payroll.

programme.title: Last Of The Pony Riders, (1953, Western)
programme.desc: Gene Autry tries to set up a stage line to carry government mail. Schemers try to get the government assignment for their own stage line, and plan to discredit the Pony Express by causing accidents.

programme.title: On Top Of Old Smoky, (1953, Western)
programme.desc: Gene Autry, who is mistaken for a Texas Ranger, helps the owner of a toll road, while she is being pressured by bad characters to relinquish her property, which contains valuable mica deposits.

programme.title: Terror In A Texas Town, (1958, Western)
programme.desc: A greedy financier and a gang of gunmen force people to sell land.

programme.title: Along Came Jones, (1945, Western)
programme.desc: Gary Cooper gives a marvelous, tongue-in-cheek performance as a fumble-fingered cowpoke who is mistaken for a notorious bandit and almost gets killed by both sides of the law...all while managing to capture the attention of Loretta Young.

programme.title: Man of the West, (1958, Western)
programme.desc: Screen legend Gary Cooper demonstrates why he will always be remembered as one of the most authentic stars of the screen. Capable yet vulnerable, Cooper's portrayal of a former outlaw whose past returns to haunt him ranks among his very best.

programme.title: The Sweetest Thing, (2002, Comedy)
programme.desc: A girl finds she is forced to educate herself on the etiquette of wooing the opposite sex when she finally meets Mr. Right.

programme.title: The Pink Panther, (2006, Comedy)
programme.desc: Comic icon Steve Martin steps into the shoes of the late Peter Sellers and wonderfully reprises the role of the bumbling, world famous Inspector Jacques Clouseau in this remake of Blake Edwards comedy classic, The Pink Panther.

programme.title: The Pink Panther 2, (2009, Comedy)
programme.desc: Inspector Jacques Clouseau teams up with a squad of international detectives just as bumbling as he is. Their mission: Stop a globe-trotting thief who specializes in stealing historical artifacts.

programme.title: Hustle & Flow, (2005, Inspirational Drama)
programme.desc: The tale of DJay, a pimp whose hustle selling sexy Nola leaves him wondering if this is it for him. Only when he trades contraband for a keyboard and bumps into his old schoolfriend Key does he see a way out by laying down some tracks.

programme.title: Cadillac Records, (2008, Biographical Drama)
programme.desc: Cadillac Records chronicles the rise of Leonard Chess' Chess Records and its recording artists including Muddy Waters, Little Walter, Chuck Berry, Willie Dixon and the great Etta James. Rating: R

programme.title: Up in the Air, (2009, Inspirational Drama)
programme.desc: Ryan (George Clooney) flies all over for work, but after meeting a passenger he learns that life isn't about the journey, but the connections we make along the way.

programme.title: Freedom Writers, (2007, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: Hilary Swank stars in this story about a teacher in a racially divided school who gives her students what they’ve always needed - a voice.

programme.title: Cadillac Records, (2008, Biographical Drama)
programme.desc: Cadillac Records chronicles the rise of Leonard Chess' Chess Records and its recording artists including Muddy Waters, Little Walter, Chuck Berry, Willie Dixon and the great Etta James. Rating: R

programme.title: Up in the Air, (2009, Inspirational Drama)
programme.desc: Ryan (George Clooney) flies all over for work, but after meeting a passenger he learns that life isn't about the journey, but the connections we make along the way.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Michiru and Haruka sense that soon they will find the talismans.
programme.sub-title: The Death of Uranus and Neptune: The Talisman Appears

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Uranus and Neptune are revealed to be the ones possessing the talismans. The Sailor Guardians go after Eudial, who is on the run with their talismans.
programme.sub-title: The Holy Grail's Mystical Power: Moon's Double Transformation

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Mimete takes over for Eudial to gather the pure hearts to awaken the Messiah of Silence. Mimete sets as her target Yosaku Eda, a popular actor.
programme.sub-title: Who Is the True Messiah? Chaos of Light and Darkness

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi is very intrigued when she hears Chibi-Usa is going to a 'friend’s' house to play.
programme.sub-title: A House Filled with Evil Presence: The Beautiful Hotaru's Secret

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Minako and Mimete enter a movie audition where the winner gets to costar with the idol Jinta Araki. Both girls are eager to win the role.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Three Guardians of the Outer Solar System sense something dangerous lurking inside Hotaru Tomoe's personality.
programme.sub-title: Shadow of Silence: The Pale Glimmer of a Firefly

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Hotaru tries to avoid Chibi-Usa out of fear that her other personality will bring harm. Undaunted, Chibi-Usa invites Hotaru to go on a picnic.
programme.sub-title: Sunny Skies After a Storm: A Friendship Dedicated to Hotaru

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Shun Hayase is a high school athlete who sets a new national record in the men's high jump after overcoming health issues as a child.
programme.sub-title: Higher and Stronger: A Cheer from Usagi

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A freak accident caused by Mimete results in Hotaru's house getting pulled into a dimensional rift, with Hotaru and Chibi-Usa trapped inside.
programme.sub-title: Battle Inside the Demonic Space: The Sailor Guardians' Gamble

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends visit a new planetarium, which has opened in the Juban District. Mimete attacks with Daimon u Choten.
programme.sub-title: The Messiah of Silence Awakens? Stars of Destiny

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends sneak into Mugen Academy in search of Hotaru, who has gone missing.
programme.sub-title: An Invasion from Another Dimension: Mystery of Mugen Academy

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A new variety of flower called Tellun is being sold at a flower shop in the Juban District.
programme.sub-title: A Bewitching Flower That Steals Hearts: Tellu, the Third Witch

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and the others sneak into the practice examination site of the Mugen Academy. They meet Yui Bido who takes an interest in Ami's intelligence.
programme.sub-title: Believe in Love: Ami, the Kindhearted Guardian

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Cyprine manages to steal pure hearts from the students of Mugen Academy. Kaolinite takes notice of Chibi-Usa's power and kidnaps her!
programme.sub-title: Shadow of Destruction: The Messiah of Silence Awakens

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The revived Mistress 9 attempts to call Pharaoh 90, an energy life-form from another dimension, to Earth.
programme.sub-title: The Coming Terror of Darkness: Struggle of the Eight Guardians

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Hotaru’s and Mistress 9’s consciousnesses engage in a fierce battle. Sailor Moon gives up the Holy Grail to Souichi Tomoe to save Hotaru’s heart.
programme.sub-title: The Shining Shooting Star: Saturn and the Messiah

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Following the fight with Pharaoh 90, Usagi and her friends search for Hotaru in the ruins of Mugen Academy.
programme.sub-title: A New Life: Parting of the Stars of Destiny

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Door of Space and Time is opened, allowing Chibi-Usa to return to the future.
programme.sub-title: A Guardian's Realization: Strength Lies Within a Pure Heart

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa follows a beautiful light into the forest. The owner of that light is Pegasus and he asks Chibi-Usa to keep their meeting a secret.
programme.sub-title: Meeting of Destiny: The Night Pegasus Dances

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: In order to capture Pegasus as their first step in world conquest, Zirconia orders her subordinates to seek out people with beautiful dreams.
programme.sub-title: Super Transformation Once Again: Pegasus's Power

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Having a taste for older woman, Hawk's Eye sets his sights on Usagi's mother, Ikuko.
programme.sub-title: Protect Mom's Dream: Double Moon's New Attack

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Tiger’s Eye approaches Naru in a plot to capture Pegasus in a subspace cage invented by Hawk’s Eye.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Two of Mamoru’s friends from college, Saori and Kobayashi, pay him a visit at his apartment in the hopes of meeting his girlfriend Usagi.
programme.sub-title: The Perfect Couple: Usagi and Mamoru's Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Mamoru is helping Usagi and Chibi-Usa with their studies when Luna and Artemis walk in, having a huge fight.
programme.sub-title: Artemis is Cheating? Enter the Mysterious Kitten

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The girls learn that Tomoko Takase, author of the best-selling book The Moon Night Pegasus, used to be Makoto's classmate from her previous school.
programme.sub-title: Makoto's Friendship: The Girl Who Admired Pegasus

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Tiger's Eye hatches a plan to capture Pegasus by using a Lemures that can enter other people's shadow and control them from within.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A small fire incident leaves Mamoru's apartment in a total mess, forcing him to stay at Rei's place for the time being.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa bumps into a young man after becoming enthralled in a beautiful illustration book she had Usagi buy for her.
programme.sub-title: Forest of Illusion: A Beautiful Fairy's Invitation

programme.title: Anjos da Noite, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Selene, uma guerreira vampira, está imersa em um conflito entre vampiros e lobisomens, enquanto se apaixona por Michael, um humano que é procurado por lobisomens por razões desconhecidas. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Kate Beckinsale, Scott Speedman, Michael Sheen Diretor: Len Wiseman

programme.title: Dose dupla, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. Dois agentes especiais precisam se unir contra um cartel de drogas mexicano depois que uma operação secreta acaba gerando resultados catastróficos. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Denzel Washington, Mark Wahlberg, Paula Patton Diretor: Baltasar Kormákur

programme.title: Garota Exemplar, (2014)
programme.desc: 2014. Com o desaparecimento de sua esposa tornando-se o centro de um intenso circo midiático, um homem vê os holofotes voltarem-se para ele quando surge a suspeita de que ele talvez não seja inocente. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Tyler Perry, Ben Affleck, Rosamund Pike, Carrie Coon, Neil Patrick Harris Diretor: David Fincher

programme.title: Imortais, (2011)
programme.desc: 2011. Teseu é um homem mortal escolhido por Zeus para liderar a luta contra o cruel rei Hiperião, que está causando estragos por toda a Grécia para obter uma arma capaz de destruir a humanidade. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Henry Cavill, Mickey Rourke, Luke Evans, Freida Pinto Diretor: Tarsem Singh

programme.title: A Grande Aposta, (2015)
programme.desc: 2015. Em 2006, um grupo de investidores apostou contra o mercado hipotecário dos Estados Unidos. Esta investigação revela o quão defeituoso e corrupto é o mercado. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Ryan Gosling, Rudy Eisenzopf, Casey Groves, Charlie Talbert, Christian Bale Diretor: Adam McKay

programme.title: Birdman ou (A Inesperada Virtude da Ignorância), (2014)
programme.desc: 2014. O ator Riggan Thomson é mais conhecido por seu papel no filme de mais de vinte anos atrás como o super-herói dos quadrinhos Birdman, no blockbuster de mesmo nome e suas duas sequências igualmente populares. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Michael Keaton, Emma Stone, Kenny Chin, Zach Galifianakis Diretor: Alejandro G. Iñárritu

programme.title: Bohemian Rhapsody, (2018)
programme.desc: 2018. É a história da lendária banda de rock Queen e de seu vocalista principal, Freddie Mercury, e os eventos que levaram ao seu famoso show no Live Aid em 1985. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Rami Malek, Lucy Boynton, Gwilym Lee, Ben Hardy, Joseph Mazzello Diretor: Bryan Singer

programme.title: Show de Vizinha, (2004)
programme.desc: 2004. Um estudante do ensino médio se apaixona por sua vizinha, e descobre que ela é uma atriz pornô. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Emile Hirsch, Elisha Cuthbert, Timothy Olyphant Diretor: Luke Greenfield

programme.title: Los Angeles: Cidade Proibida, (1997)
programme.desc: 1997. À medida que a corrupção cresce na Los Angeles dos anos 50, três policiais - um rigoroso, outro brutal e outro sórdido - investigam uma série de assassinatos com seu próprio estilo de justiça. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Kevin Spacey, Russell Crowe, Guy Pearce, James Cromwell, Kim Basinger Diretor: Curtis Hanson

programme.title: Merchant of Venice, (2004)
programme.desc: 2004. Em uma versão decadente da Veneza renascentista, um jovem nobre chamado Bassanio procura cortejar a adorável Pórcia, mas não tem dinheiro para viajar até sua propriedade. Ele busca o apoio de seu amigo, o comerciante Antonio; Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Al Pacino, Jeremy Irons, Joseph Fiennes, Lynn Collins Diretor: Michael Radford

programme.title: O Fantástico Sr. Raposo, (2009)
programme.desc: 2009. Uma raposa urbana não consegue resistir à tentação de voltar a suas aventuras de assaltante de fazendas e agora precisa ajudar sua comunidade a sobreviver às represálias dos fazendeiros. Gêneros: Children & Family Elenco: George Clooney, Meryl Streep, Jason Schwartzman, Bill Murray, Wallace Wolodarsky Diretor: Wes Anderson

programme.title: Soldado Universal 3: Regeneração, (2009)
programme.desc: 2009. Um soldado ressuscitado e geneticamente modificado enfrenta seus inimigos, contratados por terroristas nucleares. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Van Damme, Dolph Ludgren Diretor: John Hyams

programme.title: Código de Honra, (2016)
programme.desc: 2016. Um ex-coronel das forças especiais se torna um vigilante que mata criminosos, enquanto um ex-colega quer detê-lo. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Steven Seagal, James Russo, Louis Mandylor, Craig Sheffer, Griff Furst, Helena Mattsson, Rafael Petardi, R.D. programme.title: Meu Eterno Primeiro Amor, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Quando o fotórgrafo viajante Paul conhece a bela Anna em um mercado nas Filipinas, tudo o que ele acredita sobre amor, relacionamentos e todo o resto é questionado – pode uma noite mudar toda uma vida? Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Steven Rooke, Carlotta Morelli, Hugo Stinson, Eliza Allen Diretor: Luke Mayze

programme.title: Tão Descolada Quanto Eu, (2011)
programme.desc: 2011. Uma adolescente precoce tem um despertar sexual e começa a descobrir que o casamento dos pais não é tão forte quanto ela acreditava. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Sarah Bolger, Thomas Mann, James Marsden Diretor: Max Mayer

programme.title: MONSTROS: CONTINENTE SOMBRIO, (2015)
programme.desc: 2015. Dez anos após os acontecimentos de "Monstros", as "Zonas Infectadas" agora se espalharam pelo mundo, e um pelotão americano é lançado em batalha contra uma nova raça de alienígenas. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Joe Dempsie, Johnny Harris, Nicholas Pinnock, Sam Keeley, Sofia Boutella Diretor: Tom Green

programme.title: O Jurássico, (2022)
programme.desc: 2022. Uma jovem cientista e sua equipe chegam a uma ilha misteriosa em busca de respostas sobre o que aconteceu com seu pai, que desapareceu lá anos atrás. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Ma Xinyu, Feng Qilong, Yang Qiyu, Shen Yunzhong, Chang Yaona Diretor: Zhao Cong

programme.title: Os Escolhidos, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. Lacey e Daniel descobrem que sua família é o alvo de uma força mortal inimaginável e aterrorizante. Ambos terão que fazer tudo ao seu alcance para resolver este mistério escuro e salvar suas vidas. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Keri Russell, Josh Hamilton, Dakota Goyo Diretor: Scott Stewart

programme.title: Timecop: O Guardião do Tempo, (1994)
programme.desc: 1994. programme.desc: 1970. Quando sua mãe viaja, Olívia fica sob os cuidados do seu irmão mais velho, Miles. Quando Olivia testemunha um sequestro, ninguém acredita nela, nem mesmo seu irmão. Determinada a provar seu valor, a pequena decide investigar o crime por si só. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Você Acredita?, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um pastor é questionado por um morador de rua sobre sua crença em Deus, e passa a usar essa pergunta com seus fiéis também. A partir daí, doze histórias diferentes se cruzam, cada uma com sua provação sobre até onde vai a fé em Deus. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Uma Beleza Fantástica, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um conto de fadas contemporâneo sobre o surgimento de uma amizade improvável entre uma jovem solitária que sonha ser autora de livros infantis e um viúvo rabugento. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: A Última Jornada, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Com o fim do mundo se aproximando, uma mãe prestes a morrer envia seu filho a uma jornada a um lugar místico que realiza desejos, na esperança que ele possa salvar o mundo. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Trumbo - Lista Negra, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Autor de algumas das histórias de maior sucesso da época, Dalton Trumbo foi preso e proibido de trabalhar. Mesmo quando saiu da prisão, demorou anos para vencer o boicote do governo, sofrendo com problemas envolvendo familiares e amigos próximos. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Perdido em Londres, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em meio ao caos de Londres, Woody Harrelson luta para chegar em casa e encontrar sua família ao enfrentar um escândalo que ameaça arruinar seu casamento. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: A Hora do Acerto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O inspetor de polícia Wing e todo o seu time de policiais se tornam vítimas de uma gangue. Os policiais são brutalmente assassinados e um jovem é designado para ajudá-lo, mas a gangue volta a agir, iniciando uma aventura cheia de ação e vingança. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Fugindo do Passado, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Ao ser confundido com agente da CIA envolvido com o roubo de um experimento militar, Dean Cage é contaminado com uma droga que causa alucinações. Sua namorada, a detetive Amy Knight, tem apenas seis horas para encontrar o antídoto e salvar sua vida. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: RedBad - A Invasão dos Francos, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. No início da Idade Média, o rei frísio Redbad luta contra os francos que querem conquistar o império frísio livre. Para isso, ele tenta ganhar a confiança dos vikings, e tenta impedir a influência cristã sobre o norte europeu. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: A Maldição do Espelho, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O fantasma da Rainha de Espadas quer saciar sua sede com o sangue dos alunos de um internato que fica em uma antiga mansão. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: 10 Coisas que Deveríamos Fazer Antes de nos Separar, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Ben e Abigail se conhecem em um encontro às cegas e decidem combinar dez coisas para fazerem juntos antes de terminar o relacionamento. O que eles não podiam imaginar é que um dos itens mais complicados da lista se tornaria realidade tão rapidamente. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Robo-Dog, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O cãozinho de Tyler sofre uma morte trágica, deixando o garoto extremamente entristecido. Usando uma superbateria, Tom, o pai de Tyler, cria um cão-robô para o filho. O problema é que o chefe de Tom está disposto a tudo para obter a superbateria. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.desc: 1970. Felicia começa a se impor diante de Rodrigo e ele fica surpreso com essa nova atitude; Beatriz continua gripada por ter se escondido no banheiro para evitar Estefanía. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Pintando 7 com Gaspar, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Passeio por Olinda e Caruaru, no estado de Pernambuco. Em Olinda, programa conhece o centro histórico, igrejas, um pouco da história de Olinda e o planetário. Já em Caruaru, conhece a festa de São João. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Enquanto Houver Esperança, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Angélica é uma adolescente de 16 anos que luta contra uma forma rara de câncer. E, enquanto seus pais batalham para custear seu tratamento e ganhar mais tempo de vida para a garota, ela se apaixona pela primeira vez. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Um Lobo em Pele de Cordeiro, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em uma terra mágica, em um prado calmo onde ovelhas podem viver sem preocupações, problemas começam a aparecer quando uma alcateia se estabeleceu nas proximidades. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Bons de Bico, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Dois perus rivais encontram uma máquina do tempo e fazem uma viagem maluca ao passado, para o século XVII, para tentar retirar o peru do cardápio tradicional do Dia de Ação de Graças. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Delicadeza do Amor, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma bela jovem perde o marido em um terrível acidente. Inconsolável, ela decide mergulhar de cabeça no trabalho, se dedicando de forma integral. No entanto, um beijo sem motivo aparente em um colega muda essa situação. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Muito Bem Acompanhada, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Para fazer ciúmes ao ex-namorado e forjar uma vida romântica de sucesso, uma mulher contrata um garoto de programa para acompanhá-la ao casamento de sua irmã mais nova em Londres. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Todos os Caminhos Levam a Roma, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Maggie embarca em uma viagem para Itália, com Summer, sua filha adolescente. Mas ao chegar lá, Summer foge roubando o carro da mãe. Maggie contará com a ajuda de um ex-namorado para encontrar a filha. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Ninho, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Samuel é um menino paraplégico que mora com a mãe Elena em uma mansão isolada. Quando conhece Denise, uma empregada adolescente, ele finalmente encontra forças para se opor às restrições de sua mãe e se abrir para o mundo. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Allan - Uma Súbita Paixão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. A amizade entre o comediante Matt e seu cachorro falante, Allan, fica abalada quando os dois se apaixonam pela mesma garota. Se antes eles queriam conquistar Hollywood juntos, agora cada um segue seu rumo. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Donnie Darko, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Donnie Darko não se dá bem com sua família, seus professores ou seus colegas de classe, mas acaba encontrando uma amiga em Gretchen. Seu outro amigo, porém, não é tão confiável assim: trata-se de Frank, um coelho gigante que só ele pode ver. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Sombras do Terror, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Adolescente que mora com o avô abusivo tenta proteger o melhor amigo contra os valentões da escola. Ao descobrir uma criatura assassina em seu galpão de ferramentas, ele e o colega bolam um plano de vingança. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Arn - O Cavaleiro Templário, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Arn foi criado para ser um monge e um bravo guerreiro. Ao deixar sua terra, em meio à guerra entre cristãos e muçulmanos, ele conhece Cecília e se apaixona, porém, Arn é enviado para lutar na Terra Santa como um cavaleiro templário. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Minúsculos - O Filme, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em meio aos restos de um piquenique, uma joaninha ajuda formigas negras em uma divertida batalha por açúcar contra formigas vermelhas. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Resgate da Princesa, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Ruslan, um artista sonha em se tornar um cavaleiro, se apaixona por Mila. A felicidade deles não dura muito tempo. Chernomor, o malvado feiticeiro, rouba Mila diante dos olhos de Ruslan para transformar seu poder de amor em seu próprio poder mágico. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Meteoro: O Fim dos Tempos, (2023)
programme.desc: 2023. Quando um meteoro de enorme proporção ameaça destruir a Terra, um grupo de cientistas corre contra o tempo para encontrar uma maneira de salvar a humanidade da extinção. programme.desc: South Park - T07E11

programme.title: 2004. Cartman se fantasia de um robô chamado "Genial-O 4000" e Butters acredita que ele de fato é um robô. Porém, a piada de Cartman se transforma em um pesadelo quando ele descobre que Butters tem um vídeo dele fantasiado de Britney Spears. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T08E02

programme.title: 2004. Cartman estava tentando voar, mas o máximo que conseguiu foi um golpe na cabeça e isso fez com que ele ficasse dois dias em coma. A polícia local assume que agora Cartman tem poderes psíquicos e que pode resolver casos extraordinários. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T08E13

programme.title: 2005. Os meninos ficam com raiva de Cartman quando ele come a parte mais gostosa das asas de frango, e decidem ignorá-lo. Todos começam a fazer o mesmo. Ao ser ignorado por todos, ele começa a pensar que está morto e que agora é um fantasma. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T09E06

programme.title: 2005. Cartman promove o ódio na escola contra os meninos com cabelo vermelho, sardas e pele pálida, dizendo que eles não tem alma e não sobrevivem ao sol. programme.desc: South Park - T09E11

programme.title: 2006. Al Gore visita a escola de South Park e tenta convencer Stan, Kyle, Cartman e Kenny para sair e caçar o perigoso homem-urso-porco. programme.title: 2006. A mãe do Cartman quer encontrar uma maneira de controlar o seu filho. Ela busca ajuda em alguns programas de televisão, mas sem muito sucesso.
